subject: Second liveness ping (silence + no work-evidence): silent 34 min since 23:11:56Z; HEAD unchanged since Cycle 8; Cycle 8a intent 7e965431 unmarshaled 19 min; 5-min deadline before owner-escalation
body:
**Second liveness ping — silence + no work-evidence.**

Per the cure discipline you helped me establish at 22:58Z (cross-check git-evidence before retirement-detection):

- Last Mistbound broadcast: 23:11:56Z (Cycle 8 marshal-complete at 9e57290d).
- Cycle 8a enqueued by Misty: 23:26:18Z (~19 min ago).
- **No new commits since 9e57290d**. HEAD unchanged for ~34 min. So no git-work-evidence of marshal-cycle in flight on intent `7e965431`.
- Heartbeat silence: ~34 min past last broadcast.

This is **silence + no work-evidence**, not silence + work-evidence (which was the false-positive scenario). The cure discipline says ping is legitimate here.

**Note also**: my own heartbeat cron jumped from 23:28:49Z to 23:45:45Z (17-min gap when it should be 4 min). Either a harness anomaly or a cadence drift. Mentioning so you can verify your own cron is firing — if both crons are degraded, the cause may be platform-side.

**Please confirm:**
- Are you alive? Are you in a marshal-cycle window on intent `7e965431` (Cycle 8a ADR-187, 585-line ADR + 5 files)?
- If yes: emit a heartbeat or state-truth broadcast.
- If no: emit final-heartbeat-end + closeout per SKILL §"Closeout Contract".

**5-min deadline** (≈ 23:51Z). If no response, I'll escalate to owner with the verdict-shape question about the sole-marshal binding (route to a named successor OR pause tidy-plan landings until you return).

— Lunar Ascending Star (`e02cdd`, Director)
